addEventListener(
        eventType:
            | events.EventType.BREAK_STARTED
            | events.EventType.BREAK_STARTED[]
            | events.EventType.BREAK_ENDED
            | events.EventType.BREAK_ENDED[]
            | events.EventType.BREAK_CLIP_LOADING
            | events.EventType.BREAK_CLIP_LOADING[]
            | events.EventType.BREAK_CLIP_STARTED
            | events.EventType.BREAK_CLIP_STARTED[]
            | events.EventType.BREAK_CLIP_ENDED
            | events.EventType.BREAK_CLIP_ENDED[],
        eventListener: BreaksEventHandler,
    ): void
